title: Multiply Two Numbers
description: Given two integers a and b, print their product.
inputFormat: Two space-separated integers a and b
solution:
a, b = map(int, input().split())
print(a * b)

title: Sum of First N Numbers
description: Given a positive integer n, print the sum of all integers from 1 to n.

title: Square of a Number
description: Given an integer n, print its square (n * n).

title: Largest of Three Numbers
description: Given three integers on the same line, print the largest one.
solution:
a, b, c = map(int, input().split())
print(max(a, b, c))

title: Find Minimum
description: Given n integers, find and print the smallest value.
inputFormat: First line: integer n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
solution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(min(arr))

title: Count Even Numbers
description: Given n integers, count how many of them are even.
inputFormat: First line: integer n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
solution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
print(sum(1 for x in arr if x % 2 == 0))

title: Positive Negative or Zero
description: Given an integer, print POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, or ZERO.

title: Multiplication Table
description: Given an integer n, print the multiplication table of n from 1 to 5.
outputFormat: 5 lines, each showing n * i = result (for i from 1 to 5)

title: Count Characters in Word
description: Given a single word, print the number of characters it contains.

title: Repeat Word N Times
description: Given a word and a number n, print the word repeated n times separated by spaces.
inputFormat: First line: a single word. Second line: integer n.
outputFormat: The word repeated n times, separated by single spaces.
solution:
word = input()
n = int(input())
print(' '.join([word] * n))
